channel.title: Being Poetic on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Being Poetic on My Blog

item.title: Phrase
item.description:
Run-of-the-mill

“Run-of-the-mill” is an idiomatic phrase used to describe something that is ordinary, typical, or commonplace. It suggests that the thing being referred to is not special or exceptional in any way, but rather falls within the standard or average range.

[[Phrase]]
